creator: georg.wagner@greenmail.ch
text:
On starting up digikam-kde4 with kipi-plugins being installed you will get:

digikam(87884): Attempt to use QAction "camera_solid" with KXMLGUIFactory!
digikam(87884): Attempt to use QAction "usb_media" with KXMLGUIFactory!
digikam(87884): Attempt to use QAction "card_reader" with KXMLGUIFactory!
digikam(87884): Attempt to use QAction "camera_addedmanually" with KXMLGUIFactory!
digikam(87884)/digikam (core) Digikam::AlbumManager::startScan: KDirWatch method =  "Stat"
KCrash: Application 'digikam' crashing...
sock_file=/home/urs/.kde4/socket-urs.graf.ch/kdeinit4__0
Alarm clock: 14

This already happened with the previous version of digikam (rc)

Fix: 

deinstall kipi-plugins will make digikam usable. But functionality of plugins  will be missing of course.
How-To-Repeat: install kipi-plugins after installation of digikam-kde4. Starting up digikam will lead to a crash as soon as it starts scanning for the kipi-plugins
